# AUDIRA-WEB-GTA - Session Memory

> **Purpose**: This file serves as persistent memory across AI agent sessions. It is automatically updated at the end of each session and loaded at the start of new sessions to maintain context continuity.

---

## 📋 Project Overview

**Project Name**: AUDIRA-WEB-GTA (Vice City Dashboard)  
**Type**: Full-Stack Gaming Platform  
**Theme**: Cyberpunk/Neon Aesthetic with Glassmorphism  
**Primary Goal**: Real-time gaming community platform with 3D graphics, live chat, watch parties, and content management

### Architecture
- **Frontend**: Next.js 15 App Router + React 19 (Port 3612)
- **Backend**: NestJS 11 + Prisma 5.22 + PostgreSQL (Port 3613)
- **Real-time**: Socket.io WebSocket
- **Desktop**: Electron support configured

---

## 🎯 Current Status

**Last Updated**: 2026-05-19T00:09:35+07:00  
**Overall Progress**: ~40% (Foundation Phase)

### Component Status
- **Frontend**: ~18.9% complete (Foundation + Core UI ✅)
- **Backend**: ~70% complete (Phase 1 Foundation ✅, Auth pending)
- **Database**: Schema designed ✅, Prisma configured ✅
- **Authentication**: Not yet implemented ⏳
- **Real-time Features**: Client-side ready ✅, Backend pending ⏳

### Active Work
- Memory system initialized and populated with project context
- Ready for Phase 2 implementation (Navigation, Content Cards, Visual Effects)

### Blockers
- Backend auth module needs implementation before frontend auth can be tested
- Database migrations need to be run (Prisma client generation pending)

---

## 📝 Recent Changes

### Session: 2026-05-19T00:31:00+07:00 (Session 3)
- ✅ Implemented complete Vice City News page design
- ✅ Created Sidebar navigation component with icon-based menu
- ✅ Created NewsCard component with cyberpunk gradient placeholders
- ✅ Created MostPopular sidebar showing ranked articles
- ✅ Created LiveNewsFeed component with real-time updates
- ✅ Created Newsletter subscription component
- ✅ Updated News page with full layout (navigation tabs, filters, grid, pagination)
- ✅ Updated dashboard layout to use new Sidebar component
- ✅ Added proper spacing (ml-32) for sidebar layout
- **Achievement**: Full-featured news page matching the Vice City cyberpunk aesthetic
- **Components Created**: 6 new components (Sidebar, NewsCard, MostPopular, LiveNewsFeed, Newsletter, updated News page)

### Session: 2026-05-19T00:19:15+07:00 (Session 2)
- ✅ Fixed build error in ErrorBoundary.tsx
- ✅ Corrected import statements to use index file instead of direct imports
- ✅ Verified no other files have similar import issues
- **Issue**: ErrorBoundary was importing GlassCard and NeonButton as named exports directly from component files, but they use default exports
- **Solution**: Changed imports to use the index file which properly re-exports defaults as named exports

### Session: 2026-05-19T00:09:35+07:00 (Session 1)
- ✅ Created `memory.md` for persistent session memory
- ✅ Analyzed complete project structure
- ✅ Documented tech stack and architecture
- ✅ Identified current status and next steps
- ✅ Catalogued all key files and documentation

### Previous Session: 2026-05-18
- ✅ Frontend foundation completed (8 tasks)
- ✅ Core UI components built (GlassCard, NeonButton, Input, Modal, Card)
- ✅ API client with retry logic implemented
- ✅ WebSocket client with auto-reconnection implemented
- ✅ Backend NestJS project initialized
- ✅ Prisma schema created with User, Article, Video, Event models

---

## 🔄 Next Steps

### Immediate (Backend)
1. Generate Prisma client (`npx prisma generate`)
2. Run database migrations (`npx prisma migrate dev`)
3. Create auth module (login, register endpoints)
4. Implement JWT strategy and guards
5. Test authentication flow

### Immediate (Frontend)
1. **Wave 2**: Navigation system with sidebar
2. **Wave 2**: Content Card system with lazy loading
3. **Wave 2**: Hero Section with cinematic background
4. **Wave 3**: Particle System (Canvas API)
5. **Wave 3**: Mouse Reactive Glow effect

### Short-term
1. Connect frontend auth pages to backend API
2. Implement OAuth providers (Google, Discord, Steam)
3. Build dashboard pages (News, Videos, Events, Stats, Community, Settings)
4. Add 3D graphics components with React Three Fiber
5. Implement real-time chat and watch party features

---

## 💡 Important Decisions

### Architecture Decisions
- **Monorepo Structure**: Separate `backend/` and `vice-city-dashboard/` directories
- **Port Allocation**: Backend 3613, Frontend 3612
- **Authentication**: JWT with httpOnly cookies + OAuth providers
- **Real-time**: Socket.io for WebSocket communication
- **Database**: PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM
- **State Management**: Zustand for frontend state
- **Validation**: Zod for frontend, class-validator for backend

### Design Decisions
- **Theme**: Cyberpunk neon aesthetic (pink #ff006e, purple #8b00ff, blue #00d9ff, magenta #ff00ff)
- **UI Pattern**: Glassmorphism with backdrop-filter blur effects
- **Animations**: Framer Motion with 100ms response time target
- **Typography**: Custom neon glow text effects
- **Scrolling**: Lenis smooth scrolling library

### Technical Decisions
- **Next.js 15**: App Router with Turbopack for fast development
- **TailwindCSS 4**: Using new @theme directive (no config file)
- **TypeScript**: Strict mode with 40+ type definitions
- **Error Handling**: Comprehensive error types (AUTH, VALIDATION, NOT_FOUND, SERVER, NETWORK)
- **Request Management**: Deduplication and exponential backoff retry (1s, 2s, 4s)

---

## 🔧 Technical Notes

### Environment Setup

**Backend (.env)**
```env
DATABASE_URL="postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/vicecity"
JWT_SECRET="your-secret-key-here"
JWT_EXPIRES_IN="7d"
PORT=3613
NODE_ENV="development"
FRONTEND_URL="http://localhost:3612"
```

**Frontend (.env.local)**
```env
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3613/api
NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL=http://localhost:3613
```

### Dependencies

**Backend Key Packages**
- @nestjs/core, @nestjs/common (11.0.1)
- @nestjs/jwt (11.0.2), @nestjs/passport (11.0.5)
- @prisma/client (5.22.0), prisma (5.22.0)
- bcrypt (6.0.0), passport-jwt (4.0.1)
- class-validator (0.15.1), class-transformer (0.5.1)

**Frontend Key Packages**
- next (16.2.6), react (19.2.4)
- framer-motion (12.38.0)
- socket.io-client (4.8.3)
- @react-three/fiber (9.6.1), three (0.184.0)
- zustand (5.0.13), zod (4.4.3)
- lenis (1.3.23)

### Configuration

**Start/Stop Scripts**
- `start.bat` - Starts both backend and frontend servers
- `stop.bat` - Stops all running services

**Backend Commands**
```bash
cd backend
npm run start:dev  # Development mode with watch
npm run build      # Production build
npm run start:prod # Production mode
```

**Frontend Commands**
